formulas.heading: Calculation formulas:
formulas.kpiBonusHours: KPI bonus (hours) = Hours worked x KPI bonus % / 100
formulas.kpiBonusAmount: KPI bonus (amount) = Hourly rate x KPI bonus (hours)
formulas.hoursTotal: Hours total (amount) = Hourly rate x Hours worked
formulas.grandTotal: Grand total = Hours total + KPI bonus (amount)
